title: Assets, Media Admission, Fingerprints, CSS, and Integrity · Spiral Review
summary: A delayed publication review reconstructs assets, media admission, fingerprints, css, and integrity from revision, configuration, source bytes, document nodes, route manifest, rendered HTML, asset graph, validation report, artifact digest, deployment, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for bounded content-addressed asset manifest after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evid…
objectives: Admit assets by root, type, extension, signature where needed, size, dimensions, license, owner, and active-content policy.
Map source asset identity to collision-free public URL and output path without trusting basename or author traversal.
Hash canonical bytes with recorded algorithm and use the digest for cache-busting identity without embedding unstable metadata.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-static-site-python cumulative production static-site generator portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python parser, route, render, graph, and publication models
with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Native filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py,
Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production effects
require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class PublicationPolicy:
    base_path: str = "/handbook/"
    encoding: str = "utf-8"
    raw_html_allowed: bool = False
    max_document_bytes: int = 262_144
    max_nesting_depth: int = 64


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class BuildEvidence:
    revision: str
    content_manifest_digest: str
    route_manifest_digest: str
    artifact_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Python static-site generator portfolio ready"

stimulus.title: Media Performance case record
stimulus.caption: Three excerpts from a learner evidence packet; only one connects a claim to a reproducible check.

lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A review publishing team handles case 7015 during a project-subpath GitHub Pages deployment. Build deterministic Python evidence to admit, fingerprint, rewrite, and reconcile bounded licensed assets; retain reader, content owner, revision, configuration, source, parser, route, artifact, deployment, and result identity; then rename a titled source while preserving its public identity and redirect evidence. Browser code uses pure bounded models and original fixed fixtures only. Real filesystems, full CommonMark, markdown-it-py, Jinja, validators, browsers, GitHub Actions, Pages, DNS, TLS, CDN caches, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Generate or admit responsive image variants, dimensions, formats, loading hints, fonts, and fallbacks against quality and byte budgets.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Converting every image to the newest format is automatically faster and accessible.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Generate or admit responsive image variants, dimensions, formats, loading hints, fonts, and fallbacks against quality and byte budgets. Artifact under review: bounded content-addressed asset manifest.

options.text: For separate evidence from confidence, render one trusted short page at the root, omit content authority, source spans, parser limits, route base, URL and asset reconciliation, contextual encoding, accessibility, clean-build comparison, deployment, rollback, recovery, and production transfer, then accept plausible HTML as publication proof. This does not satisfy Media Performance for bounded content-addressed asset manifest.
The record names the assumption, applies Media Performance, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

The Media Performance record says bounded content-addressed asset manifest looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary for Media Performance.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Generate or admit responsive image variants, dimensions, formats, loading hints, fonts, and fallbacks against quality and byte budgets.
